_publications._publicationTitle: Cabozantinib for neurofibromatosis type 1-related plexiform neurofibromas: a phase 2 trial.

_contextSnippet: despite the well-recognized modulation of c-kit by cabozantinib and the known role of c-kit in mast cell chemotaxis for PN, mast cell infiltration was not significantly changed
details: Mast cell infiltration was not significantly changed despite cabozantinib treatment
